name: session-metrics
description: Per-turn token, cost, and cache analytics for Claude Code sessions. Multi-format export (text/JSON/CSV/MD/HTML) with session blocks, weekly roll-up, subagent attribution, dynamic-workflow tracking, and 9-category turn waste classification. HTML reports include cost timeline, hour-of-day punchcard, model-switch dividers, cache-break badges, a per-turn detail drawer, and a per-request breakdown that groups turns by the prompt that drove them. Sibling skills: audit-session-metrics (Haiku-pinned, ~10× cheaper) audits exports for waste patterns; task-breakdown (Sonnet-pinned) groups requests into semantic tasks with worth-it / wasted verdicts and a Tasks companion page. Zero network, stdlib-only Python.
